usecases.name: Web Testing
usecases.goal: Load and functionally test websites from multiple regions and IPs to confirm geo-routing, CDN behaviour and rendering work correctly for every user, not just those on the office network.

usecases.name: Retail Arbitrage
usecases.goal: Check regional stock, pricing and clearance deals across retailers without triggering purchase limits or blocks, so profitable buy-low sell-high opportunities can be sourced at scale.

usecases.name: Competitor Analysis
usecases.goal: Gather rivals' public pricing, positioning, promotions and feature pages consistently and anonymously, avoiding the tailored or cloaked content sites serve to known corporate IPs.

usecases.name: News Aggregation
usecases.goal: Pull articles and headlines continuously from paywall-light and region-locked news outlets worldwide without rate-limit bans, keeping feeds fresh and geographically complete.

usecases.name: Sentiment Analysis
usecases.goal: Collect large, geographically diverse volumes of forum, review and social posts for NLP models without hitting per-IP throttling that skews or truncates the dataset.

usecases.name: Crypto Trading Bots
usecases.goal: Distribute API and order-book requests across many IPs to stay under exchange rate limits, reduce latency-based blocks and keep automated strategies running uninterrupted.

usecases.name: NFT Minting
usecases.goal: Spread mint requests across multiple IPs to compete fairly for limited drops without a single address being wallet-rate-limited or flagged as bot traffic.

usecases.name: Betting & Odds Aggregation
usecases.goal: Scrape live odds from bookmakers across jurisdictions in real time to spot value and arbitrage lines, without geo-blocks or per-IP request caps interrupting the feed.

usecases.name: Coupon Aggregation
usecases.goal: Harvest and validate discount codes and promotions across regional storefronts at scale, capturing localised offers that only appear to in-country visitors.

usecases.name: Job Posting Automation
usecases.goal: Publish and refresh listings across many job boards and regional portals from stable IPs, avoiding the duplicate-detection and rate blocks that stall high-volume posting.

usecases.name: API Access Management
usecases.goal: Route high-volume calls to third-party APIs through rotating IPs to stay within per-IP quotas and maintain reliable throughput on public or partner endpoints.

usecases.name: Threat Intelligence
usecases.goal: Investigate malicious domains, phishing kits and dark-corner sites from disposable, untraceable IPs so probes cannot be linked back to the organisation or serve decoy content.

usecases.name: Domain Research
usecases.audience: Investors, brand teams and SEO specialists
usecases.goal: Bulk-check WHOIS, DNS, availability and historical snapshots across many registrars and lookup tools without tripping the query limits that block a single research IP.

usecases.name: Email Verification
usecases.goal: Validate large mailing lists via distributed SMTP and verification checks without a single IP being greylisted or blacklisted, protecting sender reputation and accuracy.
